metadata.title: Pricing
metadata.description: Plans from €450 per company per year. Shareholder registry, incentive plans, shareholder and board meetings. No implementation cost, onboarding in one week.
metadata.keywords: plans, pricing, rates, costs, subscription, annual, shareholder registry, cap table

hero.description: Save time by automating manual tasks, avoid errors and keep your data always up to date. Add value to all stakeholders.

plans.extras: Features with extra cost: shares or incentives marketplace.

items.a: From €450 per company per year on the Basic plan (up to 10 partners or beneficiaries). The Advanced plan is €650/year (up to 20) and Pro is €850/year (up to 50). Custom plans are available for company groups or larger needs.
Communications, electronic signature, full onboarding in one week and support in Spanish and English. No hidden implementation fees.

items.q: Which features have an extra cost?
items.a: The shares or incentives marketplace (secondary market) is available as an additional module.
Full onboarding takes one week, including data migration from Excel or other tools.
Book a 30-minute demo with a corporate expert at calendly.com/sttok/30min. You will see the platform applied to your case before deciding.
